Class TahmKench

java.lang.Object
NonGui.BaseEntity.BaseCard
NonGui.BaseEntity.ActionCard
NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.HeroCard.HeroCard
NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Support.TahmKench
All Implemented Interfaces:
HaveClass
public class TahmKench extends HeroCard
Represents the "Tahm Kench" Hero Card.

Ability: An Acquired Taste
Requirement: Roll 9+
Effect: Choose another player. You and that player swap your entire hands.

Tahm Kench offers a bargain that can leave opponents empty-handed and desperate.

  • Method Details

    • useAbility

      public void useAbility(Player player)
      Executes the An Acquired Taste ability.

      Logic Flow: 1. Target identification: Identify all players except the owner. 2. Interaction: Owner selects a target player via GameChoice. 3. Swap: Exchanges the ObservableList references for hands between the two players. * @param player The player who activated Tahm Kench's ability.

      Specified by:
      useAbility in class HeroCard
      Parameters:
      player - The player controlling the hero.
